title: Used Materials, Appliances and Equipment
full_text:
1.2.2.3 Used Materials, Appliances and Equipment
Used Materials, Appliances and Equipment
1) Unless otherwise specified, used materials, appliances and equipment are
permitted to be reused when they meet the requirements of this Code for new materials
and are satisfactory for the intended use.

sentences.text: Unless otherwise specified, used materials, appliances and equipment are permitted to be reused when they meet the requirements of this Code for new materials and are satisfactory for the intended use.
